title: DHL Stormers vs Hollywoodbets Sharks: Epic rugby showdown in George
description: GEORGE NEWS - Get ready for a night of rugby...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - Get ready for a night of rugby as the DHL Stormers face off against the Hollywoodbets Sharks in a friendly match at Outeniqua Park Stadium in George!","html":"GEORGE NEWS - Get ready for a night of rugby as the DHL Stormers face off against the Hollywoodbets Sharks in a friendly match at Outeniqua Park Stadium in George!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is your chance to witness two of South Africa’s rugby powerhouses battle it out in an unforgettable showdown.","html":"This is your chance to witness two of South Africa’s rugby powerhouses battle it out in an unforgettable showdown."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The match takes place next Friday 12 September at 18:00 and gates open at 12:30 at the Outeniqua Park Stadium in George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tickets cost R100, but the first 1 000 tickets are sold for R80 per person with free entry for children under three.","html":"Tickets cost R100, but the first 1 000 tickets are sold for R80 per person with free entry for children under three."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tickets went on sale on 2 September and are available at the following locations: Outeniqua Park, Top Gear Sport, Pick n Pay (Pacaltsdorp and Knysna Road), Grootbrak Spar and Buddy’s Liquor Store in George.","html":"Tickets went on sale on 2 September and are available at the following locations: Outeniqua Park, Top Gear Sport, Pick n Pay (Pacaltsdorp and Knysna Road), Grootbrak Spar and Buddy’s Liquor Store in George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more on sister publication, George Herald","html":"Read more on sister publication, George Herald"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: DHL Stormers vs Hollywoodbets Sharks: Epic rugby showdown in George
